events.output_text: To initiate the password reset process, the user will need to provide their **username or email address** associated with the account. The system will then send a password reset link or code to the registered email or phone number. Ensure the user checks their inbox (and spam/junk folder) for the reset instructions. If they encounter issues, alternative verification methods (e.g., security questions, backup phone number) may be required.
